mapper.select: SELECT POST_ID, BOARD_ID, MBR_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, VIEW_COUNT, RCMD_CNT, NOTICE_YN, PIN_YN, PUB_YN, R_DTTM, R_USER, REG_IP, U_DTTM, U_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN FROM TB_POST WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POST ( POST_ID, BOARD_ID, MBR_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, VIEW_COUNT, RCMD_CNT, NOTICE_YN, PIN_YN, PUB_YN, R_DTTM, R_USER, REG_IP, U_DTTM, U_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{boardId}, #{mbrId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, #{noticeYn}, #{pinYn}, #{pubYn}, #{rDttm}, #{rUser}, #{regIp}, #{uDttm}, #{uUser}, #{updIp}, 'N', 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_POST SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, U_DTTM = #{uDttm}, U_USER = #{uUser}, UPD_IP = #{updIp} WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
UPDATE TB_POST SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
